# Decision and Asset Names

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/releaseartifacts -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Release Artifacts](../release-artifacts.md)

`riido-daemon` publishes assets from `.github/workflows/release-artifacts.yml` using `scripts/build-release-package.sh`.

| Platform | Target | Asset |
| --- | --- | --- |
| macOS amd64 | `darwin/amd64/tar` | `riido-daemon_darwin_amd64.tar.gz` |
| macOS arm64 | `darwin/arm64/tar` | `riido-daemon_darwin_arm64.tar.gz` |
| Linux amd64 | `linux/amd64/tar` | `riido-daemon_linux_amd64.tar.gz` |
| Linux arm64 | `linux/arm64/tar` | `riido-daemon_linux_arm64.tar.gz` |
| Windows amd64 | `windows/amd64/zip` | `riido-daemon_windows_amd64.zip` |
| Windows arm64 | `windows/arm64/zip` | `riido-daemon_windows_arm64.zip` |

Archives contain:

- riido or riido.exe
- LICENSE
- NOTICE.md
- VERSION

Checksums are published as `SHA256SUMS` by the release publish script.
